title: Manipulate honey bee brood
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manipulate honey bee brood demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to manipulate brood

pcs.text: Establish purpose for manipulating brood and plan appropriate actions and sequence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish purpose for manipulating brood and plan appropriate actions and sequence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish purpose for manipulating brood and plan appropriate actions and sequence.

pcs.text: Select tools and equipment required to manipulate brood and ensure serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and equipment required to manipulate brood and ensure serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and equipment required to manipulate brood and ensure serviceability.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls associated with manipulating honey bee brood
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls associated with manipulating honey bee brood?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks and apply appropriate controls associated with manipulating honey bee brood.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Observe site quarantine or biosecurity procedures according to workplace procedures and biosecurity code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe site quarantine or biosecurity procedures according to workplace procedures and biosecurity code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe site quarantine or biosecurity procedures according to workplace procedures and biosecurity code of practice.

pcs.text: Identify risks to bees, brood and queen and take actions to minimise risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify risks to bees, brood and queen and take actions to minimise risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify risks to bees, brood and queen and take actions to minimise risks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to manipulate brood

elements.title: Manipulate brood

pcs.text: Open hive and remove frames according to planned sequence and set aside in suitable safe position
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Open hive and remove frames according to planned sequence and set aside in suitable safe position?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Open hive and remove frames according to planned sequence and set aside in suitable safe position.

pcs.text: Replace frames in hive in sequence and position according to planned manipulation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Replace frames in hive in sequence and position according to planned manipulation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Replace frames in hive in sequence and position according to planned manipulation.

pcs.text: Monitor hive following manipulation and take appropriate action to minimise disturbance to brood according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor hive following manipulation and take appropriate action to minimise disturbance to brood according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor hive following manipulation and take appropriate action to minimise disturbance to brood according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean work area and dispose of waste materials according to workplace waste management and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean work area and dispose of waste materials according to workplace waste management and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean work area and dispose of waste materials according to workplace waste management and biosecurity procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Manipulate brood

elements.title: Update and maintain apiary records

pcs.text: Update apiary records for hive manipulations according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update apiary records for hive manipulations according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update apiary records for hive manipulations according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain mandatory records for hive manipulations according to legislative and biosecurity reporting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain mandatory records for hive manipulations according to legislative and biosecurity reporting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain mandatory records for hive manipulations according to legislative and biosecurity reporting requirements.
